prescription Drugs 
 09 = Other dual eligible, but without 
Medicaid coverage 

99 = Unknown 

COMMENT: The original source for this variable is the State Medicare Modernization Act (MMA) files that states 
submit to CMS. Those files are considered the “gold standard” for
